heading: Unfunded priorities of the intelligence community: annual report
label: 3113 Unfunded priorities of the intelligence community: annual report
notes: Amendments2023—Subsec. (a). inserted “prepare and” after “each element of the intelligence community shall”.Pub. L. 118–31
amendments: Amendments2023—Subsec. (a). inserted “prepare and” after “each element of the intelligence community shall”.Pub. L. 118–31

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: a Annual report
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the head of each element of the intelligence community shall prepare and submit to the Director of National Intelligence, the congressional intelligence committees, the Subcommittee on Defense of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate, and the Subcommittee on Defense of the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives a report on the unfunded priorities of the programs under the jurisdiction of such head.section 1105 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: A summary description of such priority, including the objectives to be achieved if such priority is funded (whether in whole or in part).

children.label: B
children.text: Whether such priority will satisfy a covert action or support collection against requirements identified in the National Intelligence Priorities Framework of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (or any successor mechanism established for the prioritization of programs and activities), including a description of such requirements and the related prioritization level.

children.label: C
children.text: The additional amount of funds recommended in connection with the objectives under subparagraph (A).

children.label: iii
children.text: the project and, if applicable, subproject.

children.heading: Prioritization of priorities
children.label: 2 Prioritization of priorities
children.text: Each report shall present the unfunded priorities covered by such report in overall order of urgency of priority among unfunded priorities.
is not funded in the budget of the President for the fiscal year as submitted to Congress pursuant to ;section 1105 of title 31

is necessary to fulfill a covert action or to satisfy an information requirement associated with the collection, analysis, or dissemination of intelligence that has been documented within the National Intelligence Priorities Framework; and

children.label: A
children.text: additional resources had been available for the budget to fund the program, activity, or mission requirement; or

children.label: B
children.text: the program, activity, or mission requirement has emerged since the budget was formulated.
